zh.lifeSummary: 當Janet Douglas of Drumlanrig於1498年出生在蘇格蘭艾斯爾吉爾莫爾斯時，她的父親Sir William Douglas 6th Lord of Drumlanrig17歲，母親Elizabeth Gordon of Lochinvar13歲。她於1509年7月4日與John Maxwell在英國蘇格蘭度福利爾結婚。她去世在蘇格蘭洛包爾斯福德，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭艾丁波。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Janet Douglas of Drumlanrig于1498年出生在苏格兰艾斯爾吉爾莫爾斯时，她的父亲Sir William Douglas 6th Lord of Drumlanrig17岁，母亲Elizabeth Gordon of Lochinvar13岁。她于1509年7月4日与John Maxwell在英国苏格兰度福利爾结婚。她去世在苏格兰洛包爾斯福德，埋葬在英国苏格兰艾丁波。

nameMeanings.name: Douglas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from any of various places called from their situation on a river named with Gaelic dubh ‘dark, black’ + glas ‘stream’ (a derivative of glas ‘blue’). There are several localities in Scotland and Ireland so named, but the one from which the surname is derived in most if not all cases is Douglas in Lanarkshire 20 miles south of Glasgow, the original stronghold of the influential Douglas family and their retainers.

History: The family taking their name from Douglas in Lanarkshire were of Flemish origin. They rose to great prominence in the 14th and 15th centuries, controlling the earldoms of Douglas, Morton, and Angus, and later, Queensberry.

variants.name: Douglass
meanings: Scottish and English (Durham and Northumbria): variant of   Douglas  .

History: William Douglass, a physician recognized for his identification and description of an epidemic of scarlet fever, was born c. 1691 in Gifford, Haddington County, Scotland, and settled in Boston in 1718. The abolitionist, orator, and journalist Frederick Douglass assumed the name after escaping from slavery in 1838 and traveling to Massachusetts. Son of a white father and a slave with some Indian blood, he was born Frederick Augustus Washington Bailey c. 1817 in Tuckahoe, MD.

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: possibly a metonymic occupational name for a fisherman, from orfe, a species of freshwater fish. Alternatively, a habitational name from Urff near Kassel, formerly Orpha.

nameMeanings.name: Janet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a diminutive of   Jane  , already in common use in the Middle English period. It remained in use in Scotland and in some parts of England well into the 17th century and was revived at the end of the 19th century to much more widespread use, while still retaining its popularity in Scotland. Since the 1960s, however, it has rather gone out of fashion in Britain.

variants.name: Jannet

en.lifeSummary: When Janet Douglas of Drumlanrig was born in 1498, in Kilmaurs, Ayrshire, Scotland, her father, Sir William Douglas 6th Lord of Drumlanrig, was 17 and her mother, Elizabeth Gordon of Lochinvar, was 13. She married John Maxwell on 4 July 1509, in Dumfriesshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. She died in Cessford, Roxburghshire, Scotland, and was buried in Edinburgh, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Janet Douglas of Drumlanrig est née en 1498, à Kilmaurs, Ayrshire, Écosse, son père, Sir William Douglas 6th Lord of Drumlanrig, avait 17 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Gordon of Lochinvar, avait 13 ans. Elle a épousé John Maxwell le 4 juillet 1509, à Dumfriesshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Elle est décédée à Cessford, Roxburghshire, Écosse, et a été enterrée à Edinburgh, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Janet Douglas of Drumlanrig 1498 in Kilmaurs, Ayrshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir William Douglas 6th Lord of Drumlanrig 17 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Gordon of Lochinvar 13. Sie hat am 4. Juli 1509 in Dumfriesshire, Schottland, United Kingdom John Maxwell geheiratet. Sie starb in Cessford, Roxburghshire, Scotland und wurde in Edinburgh, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Janet Douglas of Drumlanrig è nata il nel 1498 nel Kilmaurs, Ayrshire, Scotland, sua padre, Sir William Douglas 6th Lord of Drumlanrig, aveva 17 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Gordon of Lochinvar, aveva 13 anni. Lei sposato John Maxwell il 4 luglio 1509, nel Dumfriesshire, Scozia, Regno Unito. Morì nel Cessford, Roxburghshire, Scotland, e fu sepolta a Edinburgh, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Janet Douglas of Drumlanrigが1498年にスコットランドエイルシュアイアキルマアウルズで生まれた時，父Sir William Douglas 6th Lord of Drumlanrigは17歳，母Elizabeth Gordon of Lochinvarは13歳であった。1509年7月4日にイギリススコットランドダムフリーシュアイアでJohn Maxwellと結婚した。彼女はスコットランドロクスブルグhシュアイアセスフォードで死去し，イギリススコットランドエディンブルグにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Janet Douglas of Drumlanrig(이)가 1498년 스컷랜드 에이르실르 킬모르스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William Douglas 6th Lord of Drumlanrig(은)는 17세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Gordon of Lochinvar(은)는 13세였다. 그녀는 1509년 7월 4일 영국 스코틀랜드 드프리실르에서 John Maxwell(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 스컷랜드 록스버그h실르 세스퍼드에서 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 에딘버그에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Janet Douglas of Drumlanrig nasceu em 1498, em Kilmaurs, Ayrshire, Scotland, seu pai, Sir William Douglas 6th Lord of Drumlanrig, tinha 17 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Gordon of Lochinvar, tinha 13 anos. Ela casou-se com John Maxwell em 4 de julho de 1509, em Dumfriesshire, Escócia, United Kingdom. Ela faleceu em Cessford, Roxburghshire, Scotland, e foi sepultada em Edinburgh, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Janet Douglas of Drumlanrig родилась в 1498 г. в местности килмаурс, аиршир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Sir William Douglas 6th Lord of Drumlanrig было 17 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Gordon of Lochinvar, 13. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Maxwell 4 июля 1509 г. в местности думфриессхир, Шотландия, Великобритания. Она умерла в местности кессфорд, роксбургшир, Шотландия и была похоронена в местности эдинбург, Шотландия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Janet Douglas of Drumlanrig nació en 1498, en Kilmaurs, Ayrshire, Scotland, su papá, Sir William Douglas 6th Lord of Drumlanrig, tenía 17 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Gordon of Lochinvar, tenía 13 años. Se casó con John Maxwell el 4 de julio de 1509, en Dumfriesshire, Escocia, Reino Unido. Murió en Cessford, Roxburghshire, Scotland, y fue sepultada en Edinburgh, Escocia, Reino Unido.
